name: HERITAGE COMMERCE CORP
summary: PART I General We are a bank holding company formed in 1997 as the sole shareholder of Heritage Bank of Commerce (HBC or the Bank), a California-chartered, FDIC-insured community-focused business bank headquartered in San Jose, California, since its formation in 1994. We provide a full line of banking services and products to business and individual clients, with a focus on small and medium-sized business and their owners, managers and employees.
